name: cde-pipeline-obs
title: Pipeline & Job Observability
description: CDE-authored — job success rate by integration, run-lifecycle event mix & failures by job over PDC-BIDB-EXT.

dataAccesses.name: SuccessByIntegration
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT j.integration AS integ, ROUND(100.0*SUM(e.completed_count)/NULLIF(SUM(e.terminal_count),0),1) AS success_pct FROM fact_lineage_event e JOIN dim_lineage_job j ON e.lineage_job_key=j.lineage_job_key WHERE j.integration<>'Unknown' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: LifecycleMix
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT et.event_type_label AS type, SUM(e.event_count) AS events FROM fact_lineage_event e JOIN dim_lineage_event_type et ON e.event_type_key=et.event_type_key GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: FailuresByJob
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT j.job_name AS job, SUM(e.failed_count)+SUM(e.aborted_count) AS failures FROM fact_lineage_event e JOIN dim_lineage_job j ON e.lineage_job_key=j.lineage_job_key GROUP BY 1 HAVING SUM(e.failed_count)+SUM(e.aborted_count) > 0 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 15
